programmes.show_description: Tagann casadh eile sa scéal díreach nuair a shíleann na himscrúdaitheoirí go bhfuil a fhios acu cé atá ciontach. (The investigators think they've found their culprit.)
Súil siar sa ar agallaimh, ar thaibhléirithe agus ar ghearrscannáin ón tsraith Imeall. (A look back at interviews, performances, and short film pieces from the series Imeall.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Beidh Breanndán Ó Beaglaoich ag bothántaíocht i measc ghlúin na gCaipíní i bparóiste an Fheirtéaraigh. (Breanndán Ó Beaglaoich talks to people from Baile an Fheirtéaraigh, Kerry.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar an Oirthear na Gaillimhe ag bualadh le ceoltóirí na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin travels around East Galway, meeting local musicians.)
Clár é seo a rinneadh i 2008 mar cheiliúradh a dhéanamh ar dheich mbliana Ghradam Ceoil TG4. (This programme was recorded to celebrate 10 years of Gradam Ceoil TG4.)
Tá Conall agus Mairéad ar a sáimhín só ceart ar Oileán Tenerife. (This week Mairéad and Conall are on the sunny Island of Tenerife at Manantial De Tara.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Bíonn ríméad ar Ribín nuair a fhaigheann sí fáinne draíochta. (Ribín is delighted when she is given a magic ring.)
Tá Gecko tinn agus caithfidh na meicneoirí eile an obair a dhéanamh. (The other mechanics must cover for Gecko when he's sick.)
Bíonn Cory ag iarraidh bacóir a fháil ach is léir go mbíonn adharca fada ar na ba thar lear. (Cory wants to get a spoiler, but he figures out that a spoiler isn't all that.)
Tá gach duine le ní i gClós na mBalún ach ní maith le Tuck é féin a ní. (It's bath day in Balloon Barnyard, but Tuck doesn't like baths.)
Nuair a fhuadaíonn eitleog Nat, caithfidh Timmy agus an criú ceann eile a dhéanamh. (After Ranger Nat's kite blows away, the Mechas and Timmy learn to build their own.)
Má tá an droichead briste cén chaoi a rachaidh an traein trasna na hailte? (The train needs to cross the ravine but the bridge is broken.)
Ní maith le Gekko na bobghaistí atá ar bharr Chnoc Mistéire mar sin fanann sé ag bun an chnoic. (Gekko does not like being on top of Mystery Mountain.)
Tá daitheacha fiacaile ar Dheaide Siorc ach tugann Finny misneach dó. (When Papa Shark has a toothache, Finny shows him how to be brave.)
Ní maith le Igam Ogam an bronntanas a fuair sí ó Éinín. (Igam Ogam tries to get rid of an unwanted gift from Birdie.)
Féachann an chailleach an fhliúit draíochta a aimsiú chun smacht a fháil ar an domhan. (An Chailleach attempts to find the magical flute in order to control the world.)
Déanann an Chailleach cailín beag atá déanta as cáca. (An Chailleach accidentally creates a little girl made of cake.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá an scoil ar fad ag spraoi le húlahúpanna ach tá Lola tinn de. (The whole school is hula hooping, and Lola has had enough.)
Téann Charlie agus Lola ag spraoi sa ngairdín. (Charlie and Lola go exploring in the garden.)
Cé gur iarr Lola ar Mhamó agus Daideo scútar a fháil di, is scátaí oighir atá uaithi i ndáiríre. (Having begged Granny and Granddad for a scooter, Lola really wants ice skates.)
Deir Lola lena cara go rachaidh sí ag spraoi léi ach ansin tugann Marv cuireadh chuig cóisir di. (Lola promises to play with her friend, but then Marv invites her to his party.)
Tá rún ag Lola agus Lotta airgead a bhailiú chun cabhrú le panda. (Lola and Lotta are adopting a panda and decide to raise money for it.)
Tá Zak ag iarraidh curiarracht dhomhanda a shárú. (After finding a Book of School Records, Zak attempts to break a record.)
Ligeann Zak air féin go bhfuil leathchúpla aige darb ainm Zeke. (Zak pretends that he has a twin brother named Zeke!)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Caithfidh gach duine tearmann a ghlacadh i stáisiún teilifíse ón hairicín. (A police evacuation during a hurricane forces everyone to take refuge at the TV station.)
Tugann Rose bata agus bóthar don suarachán Miles. (Rose gives the boot to penny-pinching Miles.)
Bíonn neart le feiceáil ar an ráschúrsa ag Seó Chluain Meala i dTiobraid Árainn. (The racecourse is busy at the historic Clonmel Show in Tipperary.)
Le teacht mhí Lúnasa tagann deireadh le séasúr an tsamhraidh agus tá an chuid dheireanach den sadhlas á baint. (The last of the silage is being harvested.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Craoladh beo ar na cluichí ar fad i mbabhta 7 de Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 1. (Live coverage of all the games in round 7 of the Allianz Football League Division 1.)

Is iad Aoife Welby agus The Shan Vans a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (Aoife Welby and The Shan Vans swap songs for a musical challenge.)
Cailleann Micheál an cloigeann le Réailtín agus ní fhágann sé smid aici. (Micheál loses his patience with Réailtín and she is left speechless.)

Is sa Four Provinces i mBaile Átha Cliath a bheidh Pauline Scanlon sa gclár seo. (Pauline Scanlon visits The Four Provinces, Co. Dublin to hear a wealth of music.)

The Kilfenora Céilí Band a bheidh i mbun cainte le Dáithí Ó Sé sa chlár seo. (Dáithí Ó Sé meets The Kilfenora Céilí Band.)
Clár faisnéise ina mbreathnaítear ar an tionchar a bhí ag an gcóras breithiúnach in Éirinn ar mhná na tíre. (Documentary series that examines the impact of Irish law on women.)
Tom Clarke a bheidh faoi chaibidil ar an gclár seo. (Documentary on the 7 signatories of the 1916 Easter Proclamation.)

Bíonn leathán seacláide go cluasa ar Chlúmh. (Fluff gets covered in chocolate spread.)
Is breá le Cody a phluidín. (Cody loves to play with his blankie.)
Is é breithlá Emmy atá ann agus tá sé in am ceiliúradh! (It's Emmy's Birthday and it's time to celebrate!)
Téann Gorm ar aistear beag. (Blue goes on a little adventure.)
Ceapann Cory bocht go bhfuil sé ar an dé deiridh ach tá dul amú air. (Cory thinks that his days are numbered due to a misunderstanding.)
Taispeánann Roy a fheadóg dhraíochta do Chaitríona. (Roy has a special whistle and shows Caitríona it's magical powers.)
Ag foghlaim faoin amharclann a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about the theater today.)
Ag foghlaim faoi thiománaithe bus a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about bus drivers today.)
Socraíonn Posy cóisir a eagrú do Phip ach ní théann rudaí mar ba chóir. (When Posy decides to prepare a surprise party for Pip, the preparations all go wrong.)
Éiríonn Gurdy mór leis na portáin ag an trá. (Gurdy befriends some crabs at the beach.)
Castar laoch nua ar na laochra. (The heroes meet a new hero tonight.)
Níl Wussywat in ann léim anonn chomh fada lena cuid cairde. Cruthóidh sí cluiche nua. (Wussywat can't jump as far as Oggy and Duckadile.)
I ndiaidh a gcúil a bheidh gach duine ag dul inniu. (Emily Elizabeth and Clifford have fun during Backwards Day.)
Ligeann na cairde orthu féin gur taibhsí iad. (The pups pretend that they are ghosts today.)
Tá sé chomh fuar sa nGleann go strompfadh sé na Danes! (It's so cold in the Valley that the Pea-Rexes risk becoming frozen.)
Ní maith le Dot go bhfuil bruscar ar an trá. (Dot is not happy when she sees rubbish on the beach.)
Socraíonn Ella agus a cairde banna ceoil a bhunú. (Ella and the children decide to form a band of their own.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Níl aon duine ann le spraoi le Lola ó tharla go bhfuil slaghdán ar Lotta. (Lotta has caught a cold, so Lola has no one to play with.)
Féachann MacTrapp le moncaí a ghoid ach tá trioblóid go leor ag baint leis an moncaí céanna. (MacTrapp tries to steal a capuchin monkey but the monkey creates a world of trouble.)
Tógann Lola agus Victor málaí a chéile de dhearmad. Tá dialann Lola ina mála féin. (Lola and Victor switch their bags by mistake, but Lola's diary is in hers.)
Caithfidh Lola ligean uirthi féin go dtaitníonn Tracy léi. (Lola has to pretend to like Tracy.)
Tá a chuid yó-yóanna coinnithe ó Dhónall agus déanfaidh sé rud ar bith le hiad a fháil as an gcófra. (Dónall must rescue his yoyos from the confiscation cupboard.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi bheannú do dhuine a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about saying Hello!)
Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha cadhnra nua a chur sa Bhloc-Réalta. (Twelve and friends go on a spectacular space mission to save Numberland from the mysterious Block Star.)
Tá na Dathanna ag iarraidh Bogha Ceatha a dhathú. (The Colours attempt to Colour in a Rainbow.)
Taispeánann Stop dá cairde nua go mb'fhearr staidéar a thógáil scaití. (Stop shows her new friends how to pause and think things through.)
Téann Pompon in airde ar chosa croise agus cuireann sé croiméal bréige air féin chun lámh chúnta a thabhairt dá dhaide. (Pompon can't wait to be grown-up, so he can help his dad.)
Is é Ruarc Ó Confhaola a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Ruarc Ó Confhaola.)
Socraíonn Pip agus Posy seó a dhéanamh den chluiche greannmhar atá siad a imirt. (Pip and Posy decide to turn their funny game with Piggy and Froggy into a stage show.)
Beidh ár gcairde ag imirt cluiche le traein inniu. (Today's activity for the toys is the train relay game.)
Inniu lá breithe Nóinín. (Today is Nóinín's birthday.)

programmes.show_name: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programmes.show_description: Tá na Sméara Blasta ar fad ar iarraidh. (True and Beartla have a huge mystery to solve!)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina maisitheoir agus scríbhneoir nuair a bheidh sí mór. (Muireann imagines her life as a writer and illustrator when she grows up.)
Ba bhreá le Zou agus le Elzee cairpéad draíochta a bheith acu. (Zou and Elzee wish for a magic carpet and they think that their wish has come true.)
Inniu ar Ainmhithe Craiceáilte, feicfidh muid madra ag caitheamh húdaí agus gabhair i gclúidíní. (Today we'll see a dog in a hoodie, goats in nappies and curious cats.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)

Eagraíonn Coach seirbhís chuimhneacháin do sheanchara ag an beár. (Coach holds a memorial service for an old friend at the bar.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhí againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Bíonn ar Jessica an té a d'úsáid puipéid le duine éigin a mharú a aimsiú. (Jessica must find the fiend who used a puppet as a murder weapon.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar dheisceart Bhaile Átha Cliath sa gclár seo. (In this programme Doireann Ní Ghlacáin travels to South Dublin.)
Tugann Paul aghaidh ar chósta thoir na hAlban sa gclár deiridh den tsraith seo. (In the last episode of this series Paul goes in search of sunshine on the east coast.)
Rogha de na hamhráin ab fhearr a chas Johnny Brady ar stáitse Ghlór Tíre. (A selection of some of the best of Johnny Brady's performances through the years on Glór Tíre.)
Tá Christan agus Hilary réidh chun lár chathair Melbourne a fhágáil agus bogadh go Noosa. (Christian and Hilary are ready to leave inner-city Melbourne behind for Noosa.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Chris Murphy, tionchaire as Co. na Mí, a bheidh ag iarraidh a chuid nósanna siopadóireachta a athrú inniu. (We meet Chris Murphy who expresses himself through colourful outfits.)

Eagraíonn Coach seirbhís chuimhneacháin do sheanchara ag an beár. (Coach holds a memorial service for an old friend at the bar.)
